body:
Gallup Engineering
     Hey! I'm Max Gallup, currently pursuing a Master in Computer Security at VU Amsterdam. I'm also co-running a platform that offers bachelor students a final year project in the field of autonomous driving (read more). On top of that, I also offer freelance software development, specializing in the fields of: 
    
        Systems Programming
        Integrations & Automation
        System Administration & Infrastructure
        Security Analysis 
    
    Additionally, I have some experience with designing and building drones and offer the following engineering services:
    
        3D Design & Printing
        Manufacturing & Assembly
        SMD Soldering
        Embedded Security Analysis
